ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is on */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_overall" INTEGER /* Overall pick number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team is part of */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is on */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season or playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "GP" INTEGER /* Games played */,
  "G" INTEGER /* Goals scored */,
  "A" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "PTS" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "SOG" INTEGER /* Shots on goal */,
  "BA" INTEGER /* Blocked attempts */,
  "MISS" INTEGER /* Missed shots */,
  "TSA" INTEGER /* Total shots attempted */,
  "SThr%" INTEGER /* Shooting percentage */,
  "FOW" INTEGER /* Faceoff wins */,
  "FOL" INTEGER /* Faceoff losses */,
  "FO%" INTEGER /* Faceoff percentage */,
  "HIT" INTEGER /* Hits */,
  "BLK" INTEGER /* Blocked shots by the player */,
  "TK" INTEGER /* Takeaways */,
  "GV" INTEGER /* Giveaways */,
  "PPG" INTEGER /* Power play goals */,
  "PPA" INTEGER /* Power play assists */,
  "SHG" INTEGER /* Short-handed goals */,
  "SHA" INTEGER /* Short-handed assists */,
  "GWG" INTEGER /* Game-winning goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the team the player is on
Round the player was drafted in
Overall pick number of the player
League the team is part of
Name of the team's home arena
Seating capacity of the team's home arena
Start date of the regular season
End date of the regular season
Reference to the team the coach is on
Number of years of coaching experience
Type of game (regular season or playoffs)
Unique identifier for each statistic entry
